explanation: This command simulates a scenario where a base64 string resembling an MZ header is decoded into a file. The Sigma rule would detect the presence of 'TVqQAAMAAAAEAAAA' in the command line.
This PowerShell command decodes a base64 string into a file. The string 'TVpQAAIAAAAEAA8A' is part of the Sigma rule's detection criteria and would trigger an alert.
This command uses a base64 string 'TVqAAAEAAAAEABAA' from the Sigma rule and decodes it into a file. The Sigma rule would detect the presence of this string in the command line.
